examples: The results showed that, the digestive canal initiated from the gastrocoele, which was formed by invagination at gastrula stage.
The pistil shape and the development course of gastrula are not the restriction factor which cause the difference of compatibility intensity in almond.
Embryos at 4 ~ 8 cell stage showed higher survival rate and lower abnormal embryo rate than embryos at multicellular stage or early gastrula stage when radiated at the same dose and dose rate.
